course_title: MISINFORMATION, FAKE NEWS, AND CORRECTING FALSE BELIEFS ABOUT SCIENCE
description: Explores the spread of misinformation and its effects on scientific topics. Covers why people believe fake news, the role of social media in propagating fake news, and the societal impacts. Practice applying theoretical ideas and making evidence-based recommendations for correcting examples of misinformation in science, media, and industry.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Satisfied Communications A requirement or graduate/professional standing

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Satisfied Communications A requirement or graduate/professional standing
